title: Who is Empath Chan? Controversial streamer shuts down viral death rumors with blunt response
summary_full: Empath Chan responded after fake rumors about her death spread across X following a parody post claiming she died from a drug overdose. She shut down the speculation with a brief reply saying, “? I’m alive.” The controversy renewed attention on her history of ragebait content, including backlash over blackface Halloween posts and offensive videos that previously sparked widespread criticism online.
